# Blueprint Modular — Agent Context File
# Version : 0.1.43
# URL canonique : https://blueprint-modular.com/llms.txt
# Usage : injecter ce fichier en contexte avant toute génération bpm.*

## RÈGLES ABSOLUES

IMPORT: import { bpm } from '@blueprint-modular/core'
INTERDIT: import { bpm.modal } — JAMAIS de destructuring
INTERDIT: bpm.toast() dans les apps générées — utiliser bpm.badge position:fixed
INTERDIT: JSX dans data[] de bpm.table — utiliser renderCell dans columns
INTERDIT: div custom comme parent direct de bpm.metric — casse le responsive
INTERDIT: size:'md' ou size:'sm' — toujours 'small'|'medium'|'large'
INTERDIT: prop weight sur bpm.text — utiliser style={{ fontWeight: 600 }}
INTERDIT: prop value sur bpm.toggle — utiliser prop value (booléen)
MODALES: TOUJOURS à l'intérieur du return(), jamais après bpm.container()
GRAPHIQUES: TOUJOURS bpm.plotlyChart — jamais bpm.lineChart/barChart/areaChart
MÉTRIQUES: TOUJOURS dans bpm.metricRow — jamais dans div grid/flex fixe
SPINNER: size 'small'|'medium'|'large' UNIQUEMENT — jamais 'md' ni 'sm'

---

## LAYOUT

### bpm.container
bpm.container({ children*, className? })
PARENT: racine de page ou section principale
EXEMPLE: bpm.container({ children: <>{bpm.title1({children:'Dashboard'})}</> })

### bpm.grid
bpm.grid({ cols?, gap?, children?, className? })
- cols: number | { xs?,sm?,md?,lg? } (défaut:1)
- gap: number|string (défaut:'1rem')
EXEMPLE: bpm.grid({ cols:3, gap:'1.5rem', children: <>{cards}</> })

### bpm.column
bpm.column({ columns?, gap?, children?, className? })
- columns: number 1-12 (défaut:2)
- gap: number|string (défaut:'1rem')
EXEMPLE: bpm.column({ columns:2, children: <>{left}{right}</> })

### bpm.card
bpm.card({ title?, subtitle?, children?, actions?, variant?, inverted?, className? })
- variant: 'default'|'elevated'|'outlined' (défaut:'default')
- inverted: boolean — fond sombre texte blanc
PARENT: bpm.grid | bpm.column | bpm.container
EXEMPLE: bpm.card({ title:'Clients', variant:'elevated', children: <>{content}</> })

### bpm.panel
bpm.panel({ variant?, title?, icon?, inverted?, children?, className? })
- variant: 'info'|'success'|'warning'|'error' (défaut:'info')
- inverted: boolean — style Executive Summary fond sombre
EXEMPLE: bpm.panel({ variant:'warning', title:'Attention', children: <p>Message</p> })

### bpm.tabs
bpm.tabs({ tabs*, defaultTab?, onChange?, className? })
- tabs: Array<{ label:string, content:ReactNode, key?:string|number }>
- defaultTab: number (défaut:0)
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.tabs({ tabs:[
    { label:'Dashboard', content:<DashboardView /> },
    { label:'Liste', content:<ListView /> },
  ], defaultTab:0 })

### bpm.expander
bpm.expander({ title*, children*, defaultExpanded?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.expander({ title:'Détails', children:<p>Contenu</p>, defaultExpanded:false })

### bpm.accordion
bpm.accordion({ sections?, allowMultiple?, defaultOpenIds?, className? })
- sections: Array<{ id?,title:ReactNode, content:ReactNode }>
EXEMPLE: bpm.accordion({ sections:[{title:'Q1',content:<p>Réponse</p>}] })

### bpm.drawer
bpm.drawer({ children*, open*, onClose*, title?, side?, width?, className? })
- open: boolean (OBLIGATOIRE)
- onClose: ()=>void (OBLIGATOIRE)
- side: 'left'|'right' (défaut:'right')
- width: number|string (défaut:360)
EXEMPLE: {open && bpm.drawer({ open, onClose:()=>setOpen(false), title:'Détails', children:<Form /> })}

### bpm.modal
bpm.modal({ isOpen*, onClose*, title*, children*, size? })
- isOpen: boolean (OBLIGATOIRE)
- onClose: ()=>void (OBLIGATOIRE)
- title: string (OBLIGATOIRE)
- size: 'small'|'medium'|'large' (défaut:'medium')
RÈGLE: {isOpen && bpm.modal({ isOpen:true, onClose, title:'...', children:<>...</> })}
RÈGLE: TOUJOURS à l'intérieur du return() — JAMAIS après le return()
ASSOCIÉ: bpm.button (déclencheur), bpm.input/selectbox (formulaire dans modal)

---

## DONNÉES & MÉTRIQUES

### bpm.metricRow
bpm.metricRow({ children*, className? })
- children: un ou plusieurs bpm.metric()
RÈGLE: TOUJOURS utiliser pour regrouper les KPIs — JAMAIS div grid/flex fixe
PARENT: haut de page, section résumé
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.metricRow({ children: <>
    {bpm.metric({ label:'CA', value:'1,2M€', delta:8, deltaLabel:'vs N-1' })}
    {bpm.metric({ label:'Marge', value:'34%', delta:-2 })}
    {bpm.metric({ label:'Clients', value:142 })}
  </> })

### bpm.metric
bpm.metric({ label*, value*, delta?, deltaLabel?, icon?, className? })
- label: string (OBLIGATOIRE)
- value: string|number (OBLIGATOIRE)
- delta: number — positif=vert, négatif=rouge (logique higher_is_better par défaut)
- deltaLabel: string — ex: 'vs mois dernier'
PARENT: bpm.metricRow (standard) | bpm.card (KPI isolé)
INTERDIT: div custom comme parent direct
ASSOCIÉ: bpm.metricRow, bpm.badge (statut), bpm.plotlyChart (tendance)
EXEMPLE: bpm.metric({ label:'TRS', value:'74%', delta:-3, deltaLabel:'vs semaine dernière' })

### bpm.table
bpm.table({ columns?, data*, searchable?, pagination?, onRowClick?, className? })
- columns: Array<{ key:string, label:string, sortable?,
           align?:'left'|'center'|'right', renderCell?:(value,row)=>ReactNode }>
- data: Array<Record<string,unknown>> (OBLIGATOIRE)
- searchable: boolean
- pagination: boolean
RÈGLE: JAMAIS de JSX dans data[] — utiliser renderCell dans la colonne
ASSOCIÉ: bpm.badge (statut), bpm.button (actions), bpm.emptyState (liste vide)
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.table({
    columns:[
      { key:'nom', label:'Nom', sortable:true },
      { key:'statut', label:'Statut',
        renderCell:(v)=>bpm.badge({ children:v, variant:v==='Actif'?'success':'default' }) },
      { key:'actions', label:'',
        renderCell:(_,row)=>bpm.button({ children:'Éditer', size:'small', onClick:()=>handleEdit(row) }) }
    ],
    data:items, searchable:true, pagination:true
  })

### bpm.plotlyChart
bpm.plotlyChart({ data*, layout?, config?, height? })
- data: Plotly trace[] (OBLIGATOIRE)
- layout: Partial<Plotly.Layout>
- height: number (défaut:400)
RÈGLE: TOUJOURS bpm.plotlyChart pour les graphiques — JAMAIS bpm.lineChart/barChart/areaChart
PARENT: bpm.card | bpm.container
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.plotlyChart({
    data:[{ x:labels, y:values, type:'bar', marker:{ color:'var(--bpm-accent)' } }],
    layout:{ title:'Ventes par mois', xaxis:{ title:'Mois' }, yaxis:{ title:'€' } },
    height:350
  })

### bpm.progress
bpm.progress({ value*, max?, label?, showValue? })
- value: number (OBLIGATOIRE)
- max: number (défaut:100)
EXEMPLE: bpm.progress({ value:65, label:'Avancement', showValue:true })

### bpm.timeline
bpm.timeline({ items?, className? })
- items: Array<{ id?,title*:ReactNode, description?,date?,status?:'done'|'current'|'upcoming' }>
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.timeline({ items:[
    { title:'Commande reçue', date:'01/03', status:'done' },
    { title:'En production', date:'03/03', status:'current' },
    { title:'Livraison', date:'07/03', status:'upcoming' },
  ]})

### bpm.stepper
bpm.stepper({ steps?, currentStep?, onStepClick?, className? })
- steps: Array<{ id?,label*:string, optional?,content? }>
- currentStep: number (défaut:0)
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.stepper({
    steps:[{label:'Infos'},{label:'Validation'},{label:'Confirmation'}],
    currentStep:step, onStepClick:setStep
  })

---

## FORMULAIRES

### bpm.input
bpm.input({ value*, onChange*, label?, placeholder?, type?, disabled?, className? })
- value: string (OBLIGATOIRE)
- onChange: (value:string)=>void (OBLIGATOIRE)
PARENT: bpm.modal | bpm.card | bpm.container
EXEMPLE: bpm.input({ label:'Nom', value:form.nom, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,nom:v}) })

### bpm.numberInput
bpm.numberInput({ value*, onChange*, label?, min?, max?, step?, disabled? })
- value: number|null (OBLIGATOIRE)
- onChange: (value:number|null)=>void (OBLIGATOIRE)
EXEMPLE: bpm.numberInput({ label:'Quantité', value:form.qty, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,qty:v}), min:0 })

### bpm.textarea
bpm.textarea({ value*, onChange*, label?, placeholder?, disabled? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.textarea({ label:'Notes', value:form.notes, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,notes:v}) })

### bpm.selectbox
bpm.selectbox({ options*, value*, onChange*, label?, placeholder?, required?, disabled? })
- options: string[] | Array<{ value:string, label:string }>
- value: string|null (OBLIGATOIRE)
- onChange: (value:string)=>void (OBLIGATOIRE)
EXEMPLE:
  bpm.selectbox({ label:'Statut',
    options:[{value:'active',label:'Actif'},{value:'closed',label:'Fermé'}],
    value:statut, onChange:setStatut })

### bpm.dateInput
bpm.dateInput({ value?, onChange?, label?, disabled?, min?, max?, help? })
- value: Date|string|null
- onChange: (value:Date|null)=>void
EXEMPLE: bpm.dateInput({ label:'Date de livraison', value:form.date, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,date:v}) })

### bpm.toggle
bpm.toggle({ value?, onChange?, label?, disabled?, className? })
- value: boolean (OBLIGATOIRE — PAS "checked")
- onChange: (checked:boolean)=>void
INTERDIT: prop checked — utiliser value
EXEMPLE: bpm.toggle({ label:'Actif', value:form.actif, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,actif:v}) })

### bpm.checkbox
bpm.checkbox({ checked?, onChange?, label?, disabled? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.checkbox({ label:'Accepter les CGU', checked:form.cgu, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,cgu:v}) })

### bpm.radioGroup
bpm.radioGroup({ options*, value*, onChange*, label? })
- options: Array<{ value:string, label:string }>
EXEMPLE: bpm.radioGroup({ label:'Priorité', options:[{value:'low',label:'Basse'},{value:'high',label:'Haute'}], value:prio, onChange:setPrio })

### bpm.slider
bpm.slider({ value?, min?, max?, step?, onChange?, label?, disabled? })
- min: number (défaut:0), max: number (défaut:100), step: number (défaut:1)
EXEMPLE: bpm.slider({ label:'Seuil alerte', value:seuil, min:0, max:100, onChange:setSeuil })

### bpm.fileUploader
bpm.fileUploader({ onUpload?, accept?, multiple?, label? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.fileUploader({ label:'Importer CSV', accept:'.csv', onUpload:(files)=>handleFiles(files) })

---

## ACTIONS & NAVIGATION

### bpm.button
bpm.button({ children*, onClick?, variant?, size?, disabled?, fullWidth?, className? })
- children: ReactNode (OBLIGATOIRE — PAS "label")
- variant: 'primary'|'secondary'|'outline' (défaut:'primary')
- size: 'small'|'medium'|'large' (défaut:'medium')
EXEMPLE: bpm.button({ children:'Enregistrer', variant:'primary', onClick:handleSave })

### bpm.fab
bpm.fab({ onClick*, icon?, label?, position?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.fab({ onClick:()=>setOpen(true), label:'Ajouter' })

### bpm.breadcrumb
bpm.breadcrumb({ items*, className? })
- items: Array<{ label:string, href?:string }>
EXEMPLE: bpm.breadcrumb({ items:[{label:'Accueil',href:'/dashboard'},{label:'Clients'}] })

### bpm.topNav
bpm.topNav({ title*, titleHref?, items?, className? })
- items: Array<{ label:string, href:string, active?:boolean }>
EXEMPLE: bpm.topNav({ title:'App', items:[{label:'Dashboard',href:'#dashboard'},{label:'Liste',href:'#liste'}] })

### bpm.pagination
bpm.pagination({ page*, totalPages*, onPageChange*, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.pagination({ page:currentPage, totalPages:10, onPageChange:setCurrentPage })

---

## FEEDBACK & ÉTAT

### bpm.badge
bpm.badge({ children*, variant?, className? })
- children: ReactNode (OBLIGATOIRE)
- variant: 'default'|'success'|'warning'|'error'|'info'|'primary'
ASSOCIÉ: bpm.table renderCell, bpm.metric
EXEMPLE: bpm.badge({ children:'Actif', variant:'success' })

### bpm.chip
bpm.chip({ label*, onRemove?, variant?, className? })
- label: ReactNode (OBLIGATOIRE — PAS "children")
- variant: 'default'|'primary'|'outline'
EXEMPLE: bpm.chip({ label:'Urgent', variant:'primary', onRemove:()=>removeTag(t) })

### bpm.spinner
bpm.spinner({ size?, variant?, text?, neutral? })
- size: 'small'|'medium'|'large' (défaut:'medium')
- variant: 'circle'|'dot'|'wheel'|'pulse'|'bars'|'dualRing'|... (défaut:'circle')
INTERDIT: size:'md' ou size:'sm'
EXEMPLE: bpm.spinner({ size:'medium' })

### bpm.skeleton
bpm.skeleton({ width?, height?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.skeleton({ width:'100%', height:40 })

### bpm.emptyState
bpm.emptyState({ title?, description?, icon?, action?, className? })
- action: ReactNode — PAS de prop children
INTERDIT: prop children sur bpm.emptyState
EXEMPLE: bpm.emptyState({ title:'Aucun résultat', description:'Modifiez vos filtres',
  action:bpm.button({ children:'Réinitialiser', onClick:resetFilters }) })

### bpm.statusBox
bpm.statusBox({ status*, message?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.statusBox({ status:'success', message:'Enregistrement réussi' })

### bpm.message
bpm.message({ children*, variant?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.message({ children:'Opération réussie', variant:'success' })

### bpm.highlightBox
bpm.highlightBox({ number?, label?, title?, moment?, rtb?, cible?, children?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.highlightBox({ number:'01', label:'Objectif', title:'Croissance', children:<p>Détail</p> })

### bpm.loadingBar
bpm.loadingBar({ loading*, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.loadingBar({ loading:isLoading })

### bpm.tooltip
bpm.tooltip({ children*, content*, position? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.tooltip({ content:'Aide contextuelle', children:bpm.badge({ children:'?' }) })

### bpm.popover
bpm.popover({ trigger*, content*, placement? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.popover({ trigger:bpm.button({ children:'Options' }), content:<Menu /> })

---

## TYPOGRAPHIE

### bpm.title / title1 / title2 / title3 / title4
bpm.title({ children* })
bpm.title1({ children* }) — h1
bpm.title2({ children* }) — h2
bpm.title3({ children* }) — h3
bpm.title4({ children* }) — h4
EXEMPLE: bpm.title2({ children:'Liste des clients' })

### bpm.text
bpm.text({ children*, style? })
INTERDIT: prop weight — utiliser style={{ fontWeight:600 }}
EXEMPLE: bpm.text({ children:'Description', style:{ fontWeight:600 } })

### bpm.caption
bpm.caption({ children*, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.caption({ children:'Dernière mise à jour : 01/03/2026' })

### bpm.markdown
bpm.markdown({ children*, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.markdown({ children:'## Titre\n\nParagraphe avec **gras**.' })

### bpm.codeBlock
bpm.codeBlock({ code*, language?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.codeBlock({ code:'const x = 1;', language:'typescript' })

---

## MÉDIAS & VISUALISATION

### bpm.image
bpm.image({ src*, alt?, width?, height?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.image({ src:'/img/logo.png', alt:'Logo', width:120 })

### bpm.video
bpm.video({ src*, poster?, autoPlay?, controls?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.video({ src:'/demo.mp4', controls:true })

### bpm.audio
bpm.audio({ src*, controls?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.audio({ src:'/audio.mp3', controls:true })

### bpm.pdfViewer
bpm.pdfViewer({ url*, height?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.pdfViewer({ url:'/doc.pdf', height:600 })

### bpm.map
bpm.map({ center*, zoom?, markers?, height?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.map({ center:[48.85,2.35], zoom:12, height:400 })

### bpm.qrCode
bpm.qrCode({ value*, size?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.qrCode({ value:'https://blueprint-modular.com', size:128 })

### bpm.barcode
bpm.barcode({ value*, format?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.barcode({ value:'123456789', format:'CODE128' })

---

## AUTRES

### bpm.avatar
bpm.avatar({ src?, name?, size?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.avatar({ name:'Jean Dupont', size:'medium' })

### bpm.divider
bpm.divider({ className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.divider({})

### bpm.rating
bpm.rating({ value*, onChange?, max?, readOnly? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.rating({ value:4, max:5, onChange:setRating })

### bpm.autocomplete
bpm.autocomplete({ options*, value*, onChange*, label?, placeholder? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.autocomplete({ label:'Client', options:clients, value:selected, onChange:setSelected })

### bpm.colorPicker
bpm.colorPicker({ value*, onChange*, label? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.colorPicker({ label:'Couleur', value:color, onChange:setColor })

### bpm.jsonViewer
bpm.jsonViewer({ data*, collapsed?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.jsonViewer({ data:apiResponse, collapsed:1 })

### bpm.treeview
bpm.treeview({ nodes*, onSelect?, className? })
EXEMPLE: bpm.treeview({ nodes:tree, onSelect:(node)=>setSelected(node) })

---

## PATTERN FORMULAIRE COMPLET (few-shot de référence)

```typescript
'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import { bpm } from '@blueprint-modular/core'

interface Item { id: number; nom: string; statut: string; valeur: number }

export default function Page() {
  const [items, setItems] = useState<Item[]>([])
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ nom: '', statut: 'active', valeur: 0 })

  const handleSave = async () => {
    setSaving(true)
    await fetch('/api/items', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(form)
    })
    setSaving(false)
    setIsOpen(false)
  }

  return bpm.container({ children: <>
    {bpm.metricRow({ children: <>
      {bpm.metric({ label:'Total', value:items.length })}
      {bpm.metric({ label:'Actifs', value:items.filter(i=>i.statut==='active').length })}
    </> })}

    {bpm.button({ children:'Ajouter', onClick:()=>setIsOpen(true) })}

    {bpm.table({
      columns:[
        { key:'nom', label:'Nom', sortable:true },
        { key:'statut', label:'Statut',
          renderCell:(v)=>bpm.badge({ children:String(v), variant:v==='active'?'success':'default' }) },
        { key:'valeur', label:'Valeur €', align:'right' }
      ],
      data:items, searchable:true, pagination:true
    })}

    {isOpen && bpm.modal({ isOpen:true, onClose:()=>setIsOpen(false), title:'Nouvel item',
      children: <>
        {bpm.input({ label:'Nom', value:form.nom, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,nom:v}) })}
        {bpm.selectbox({ label:'Statut',
          options:[{value:'active',label:'Actif'},{value:'closed',label:'Fermé'}],
          value:form.statut, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,statut:v}) })}
        {bpm.numberInput({ label:'Valeur (€)', value:form.valeur, onChange:(v)=>setForm({...form,valeur:v??0}) })}
        {bpm.button({ children: saving ? bpm.spinner({size:'small'}) : 'Enregistrer',
          onClick:handleSave, disabled:saving })}
      </>
    })}
  </> })
}
```

---

## ROUTES API — App Router obligatoire

```typescript
// app/api/items/route.ts
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export async function GET() {
  return NextResponse.json({ items: [] })
}

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const body = await request.json()
  return NextResponse.json({ success: true, data: body })
}
```

INTERDIT: NextApiRequest / NextApiResponse / export default dans app/api/
INTERDIT: import depuis 'next' — utiliser 'next/server'

---

## PACKAGE.JSON MINIMUM

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "@blueprint-modular/core": "0.1.43",
    "next": "15.x",
    "react": "^18",
    "react-dom": "^18",
    "plotly.js": "^2",
    "react-plotly.js": "^2"
  }
}
```

INTERDIT: version @blueprint-modular/core antérieure à 0.1.43
